items.summary: Replace the existing service gallery images in the ServicesGallery component with the 8 uploaded Instagram screenshots in the following order: Screenshot_20260223-202001_Instagram-2.jpg (Career/Money/Life section header), Screenshot_20260223-202059_Instagram-2.jpg (Love & Relationship services), Screenshot_20260223-202107_Instagram-2.jpg (Future of This Connection and Deep & Detailed header), Screenshot_20260223-202112_Instagram-2.jpg (1 Month Forecast and 3 Month Forecast with Schedule Your Reading button), Screenshot_20260223-202008_Instagram-2.jpg (Money & Abundance Reading and Life Purpose/Direction Reading), Screenshot_20260223-202048_Instagram-2.jpg (Personalized Voice Note Reading and Emergency Same-Day Reading with Love & Relationship header), Screenshot_20260223-202025_Instagram-2.jpg (Mini Readings with 1 Question Reading and 3 Card Reading), Screenshot_20260223-202043_Instagram-2.jpg (Premium/Exclusive with Soulmate/Twin Flame Reading and Personalized Voice Note Reading)
Update the serviceGalleryImages data array in frontend/src/data/serviceGalleryImages.ts to reference the 8 new uploaded screenshot filenames instead of the current service category image paths

Render all 8 uploaded Instagram screenshot images as static assets in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory with appropriate filenames that maintain clarity about their content (e.g., career-money-life-header.jpg, love-relationship-services.jpg, etc.)
